method: ORACLE-FIRST on TODAY's frozen real data — Claude (claude-opus-4-8) as ideal Insight engine. Labels assigned by reading title+summary; pipeline angle hidden during judgment.
calibration: NONE — single uncalibrated LLM oracle. INDICATIVE, not certified.
oracle_angle_rubric: base_report=straight report; official_response=authority's own statement/action as lead; background_context='why/what went wrong/closer look/who is/behind'; fact_update=new number/toll/inquiry on ongoing story; market_reaction=index/share/currency move as lead; regional_followup=region-specific follow-up to a national story.

clusters.note: Valid major cluster. Pipeline over-applies official_response to plain reports and tags analysis/'why' pieces as official_response/regional_followup.
Inquiry-ordered / toll = fact_update; none are regional_followup (a national incident).

clusters.event: Bengal govt proposes Calcutta Stock Exchange revival
clusters.note: Govt budget proposal — not a market_reaction.

clusters.event: Explosion at Dakshin Energy, Visakhapatnam Pharma City
NSA Doval on Strait of Hormuz at BRICS (identical titles, 2 sources)
clusters.note: Identical headlines → pipeline gave DIFFERENT angles (official_response vs base_report) = classifier inconsistency.

clusters.event: FALSE MERGE: France heatwave drownings + ICC post-pregnancy cricket guidelines (Hindi) — UNRELATED
clusters.note: Two unrelated stories (one in Hindi) wrongly clustered — likely an OOV/Hindi embedding collision (possible side-effect of the I010 feature-hash fallback). Egregious precision failure, and it is SURFACED to the user.

clusters.event: Kunal Shah named head of WhatsApp
RBI sold net $8.9bn in April (FX data)
clusters.note: RBI data release = fact_update, not market_reaction (no index/price move).
Obituary/death report = base_report; not fact_update / official_response.

clusters.event: NEET political turn, students miss exam in Bengaluru (identical titles)
clusters.note: Identical NDTV/Google-News titles → pipeline gave official_response vs regional_followup = inconsistency.
